title: Fizzer-sweet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fizzer-sweet''' was a kind of candy preferred by children.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Pirate [[Callow Batta]] provided children with fizzer-sweets during his raids.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
